subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, Thou art the Creator of the heavens and of the earth, and Thou art, indeed, the Knower of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انک انت فاطر السموات و الارض و انک لعلی کل شیء علیم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @creation of the world
